mechanism_narrative: Rising CPIAUCSL levels directly compress real discount rates and trigger equity valuation markdowns, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in high inflation periods are not significantly lower than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS crosses above 144000.0, labor market tightness forces wage inflation expectations higher, prompting immediate risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or threshold crossing fails to predict direction with p < 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in RSAFS and HOUST signals robust consumer and housing demand that sustains corporate earnings growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint signal loses predictive power when either series decouples, or Rank IC drops below 0.02 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: During a monetary tightening cycle, rising FEDFUNDS levels directly increase borrowing costs and compress equity multiples, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal direction flips to positive during tightening periods, or out-of-sample accuracy falls below 52% in tightening regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Declining INDPRO values indicate manufacturing contraction that reduces near-term corporate revenue expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns show no significant correlation with industrial production changes.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE crosses below 4.5 percent, extreme labor market tightness triggers central bank intervention fears, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 65% of triggered instances, or threshold crossing fails to predict direction with statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: The combination of rising CPIAUCSL and falling UNRATE creates stagflationary pressure that forces aggressive monetary policy shifts, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint signal loses predictive power when either series decouples, or Rank IC drops below 0.02 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-shock recovery regime, expanding GDPC1 values reflect strong economic momentum that boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal direction flips to negative during recovery periods, or out-of-sample accuracy falls below 52% in recovery regimes.
